prompt: Create a full-body, vertical studio portrait of a cute young Japanese idol woman in a romantic festival yukata scene. She stands centered, facing the camera with a soft smile, fair porcelain skin, large gentle eyes, straight brown bangs, and long brown twin-tails tied high; add a large black bow headband. Dress her in a black yukata with pink plaid lines and large pink rose prints, wide sleeves, a pale pink obi with layered black lace bands and small heart details, black lace fingerless gloves, and black platform boots. Her pose is playful and symmetrical, with both hands raised near her cheeks like cat paws. The background is an indoor Japanese spring-festival photo set with wooden shoji screen panels, dense hanging cherry blossom branches and pink petals framing the top and sides, warm glowing paper lanterns, and a decorative paper parasol leaning on the right with red floral accents. Include exactly 5 visible lanterns: 1 tall hanging oval lantern on the upper left, 1 tall hanging oval lantern on the upper right, 1 large round floor lantern at bottom left, 1 small round floor lantern near the lower center-left, and 1 medium round floor lantern at bottom right. Use warm peach-pink lighting, soft bokeh-like glow, polished dark wooden floor with scattered cherry petals, high-detail fashion photography, clean idol portrait retouching, realistic fabric texture, no text, no watermark. Customizable details: Sayaka, black plaid yukata with large pink roses, brown twin-tails with straight bangs and a black bow, pink cherry blossom Japanese lantern studio, both lace-gloved hands raised near cheeks like cat paws.

promptZh: 创作一张全身、竖构图的摄影棚肖像，展现一位可爱的年轻日本偶像女性，置身于浪漫的节日浴衣场景中。她居中站立，面对镜头，面带温柔微笑，拥有白皙如瓷的皮肤、明亮柔和的双眼、棕色直刘海以及高扎的棕色双马尾；头上戴着一个黑色大蝴蝶结发箍。她身穿一件黑色浴衣，上面带有粉色格纹线条和巨大的粉色玫瑰印花，袖口宽大，腰间系着淡粉色腰带，并配有层叠的黑色蕾丝带和小爱心装饰，戴着黑色蕾丝露指手套，脚穿黑色厚底靴。她的姿势俏皮且对称，双手举在脸颊旁，模仿猫爪动作。背景为室内日本春季节日摄影棚，配有木质障子门屏风，顶部和两侧装饰着茂密的垂挂樱花枝和粉色花瓣，灯光温暖的纸灯笼，右侧斜靠着一把带有红色花卉装饰的纸伞。画面中需包含 5 个清晰可见的灯笼：左上方 1 个高大的椭圆形吊灯，右上方 1 个高大的椭圆形吊灯，左下角 1 个大型圆形地灯，左下方中心附近 1 个小型圆形地灯，以及右下角 1 个中型圆形地灯。采用温暖的桃粉色调灯光，呈现柔和的焦外成像效果，地面为抛光的深色木地板，散落着樱花花瓣，高细节时尚摄影风格，干净的偶像肖像修图，真实的布料质感，无文字，无水印。可自定义细节：Sayaka，黑色格纹浴衣配大粉色玫瑰，棕色双马尾配直刘海和黑色蝴蝶结，粉色樱花日本灯笼摄影棚，戴着蕾丝手套的双手举在脸颊旁模仿猫爪。
